The current visit record indicates that the patient has a diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This is a clear and explicit diagnosis of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is already documented, it is reasonable to predict that it will be coded as a diagnosis in the patient's next hospital visit, especially since it is an ongoing condition that may require management or follow-up. The presence of this specific diagnosis provides strong evidence for the likelihood of a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism."
